title: Multiple views of main table based on different groups
excerpt: Hello, I would like to know how to create a different view of the “main table” based on groups. One view of the table would be based on groups by “programs e.g. sales, marketing, digital” and the other view would be base…

posts.author: Belinda1 (Belinda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I would like to know how to create a different view of the “main table” based on groups. One view of the table would be based on groups by “programs e.g. sales, marketing, digital” and the other view would be based on groups by Quarter e.g. Q1, Q2, Q3,Q4.
Using filter function with a drop down is too clunky…any ideas?

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Belinda,

You can create filtered views on your board once and then they exist until you change the filters, which allows you to have a bunch of different views on the same board. So you could set up a filtered view just for sales and one for marketing if you have a column on your board that indicates sales vs marketing to filter by.

Does that help?

posts.author: Belinda1 (Belinda)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Larua - yes I did this but just find it a little clunky…was hoping for a different solution that didn’t mean you could only see Q1
